name: codex-memory
description: Tiered recall, context repository projection, and consent-driven long-term memory workflows for Codex using local memory files.

interface.shortDescription: A tiered local memory workflow with context repositories and explicit consent.
interface.longDescription: Codex Memory helps Codex load tiny always-on core memories, retrieve relevant semantic or episodic context for the current task, project durable context into git-friendly Markdown repositories, ask to save new memories only when they are likely to matter again, and promote stable repo rules into AGENTS.md.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Memory for this repo.
Show stored memories for this project.
